item.description:
NVBeacon is a native macOS menu bar app for monitoring remote NVIDIA GPU servers over SSH with `nvidia-smi`, process exit alerts, and GPU idle notifications.
- Added a toggle to disable per-user process highlighting from the Appearance tab when users want the lightest possible polling behavior. - Optimized process ownership detection so summary polling resolves GPU data and process UIDs in a single SSH call, while expanded process details refresh independently without resetting the main snapshot timer. - Added a user-friendly SSH connection reuse setting with optional SSH multiplexing for faster polling, plus automatic fallback to fresh sessions when reuse is not supported cleanly.
